title: Which Grill Visuals capabilities deserve implementation priority?
summary: Impact rises upward and implementation confidence rises rightward, separating immediate foundations from valuable but higher-risk public infrastructure.

options.label: Build foundations first
options.description: Prioritizes proven, high-impact diagram and continuity work before public infrastructure.

options.label: Prioritize public sharing
options.description: Useful for teammates, but lower confidence and disclosure risk make it a later bet.

options.label: Explore live collaboration
options.description: Interesting future work with low current confidence and modest V1 impact.

points.label: Architecture
points.description: Makes system boundaries and blast radius visible

points.label: Sequence
points.description: Clarifies ownership and timing across actors

points.label: State
points.description: Exposes lifecycle gaps and failure recovery

points.label: Grilling handoff
points.description: Lets another developer resume without re-discovery

points.label: Public sharing
points.description: Useful for teammates but carries disclosure risk
points.detail: Explicit share and verified unshare must land together.

points.label: Live collaboration
points.description: Interesting, but outside the read-only V1 contract
